metadata.Plot: Krodh tells the story of two brothers who are in search of the man who killed their mother. The problem is they have never seen his face, but do have his name. The elder brother Ajay gets into the world of crime and also pulls his younger brother Vijay along with him in to the underworld in order to get closer to their target. But coincidentally Ajay himself ends up being a police officer and now he wants to drag his brother out of the underworld but by now its too late as his younger brother is by now the Don of the underworld. Here starts the clash of principles and ideologies between the two brothers and they get separated. Were they successful in getting hold of their mother's killer? Were the brothers successful in settling their differences?
metadata.Writer: Vikas Anand, Rajeev Kaul, Lalit Mahajan
metadata.Actors: Sanjay Dutt, Sunny Deol, Amrita Singh
